scripts.build: pnpm --filter @openbunny/shared build && pnpm --filter @openbunny/ui-web build && tsc && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.package: pnpm --filter @openbunny/shared build && pnpm --filter @openbunny/ui-web build && tsc && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @openbunny/shared build && pnpm --filter @openbunny/ui-web build && tsc && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: pnpm --filter @openbunny/shared build && pnpm --filter @openbunny/ui-web build && tsc && vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: pnpm --filter @openbunny/shared build && pnpm --filter @openbunny/ui-web build && tsc && vite build && electron-builder --linux
